question_np: Nepal मा fraud victim support services?
options_np: Police, Cyber Bureau, legal aid, NGOs, mental health support — multiple available
explanation_np: Fraud victim support: Police/Cyber Bureau (legal), Legal Aid (court), NGOs (counseling), mental health।

options_np: Depends on case — financial recovery difficult, emotional recovery needs support
explanation_np: Fraud recovery: financial = difficult (partial possible), emotional = counseling needed, legal = months/years।

question_np: Fraud prevention vs Fraud detection को फरक?
options_np: Prevention = before fraud, Detection = after fraud occurs
explanation_np: Prevention: fraud हुनु अघि stop गर्ने। Detection: fraud भइसकेपछि identify गर्ने।

options_np: Vulnerability identify गर्ने, likelihood + impact assess गर्ने — prevention prioritize
explanation_np: Risk assessment: vulnerabilities identify, likelihood/impact estimate, prevention measures prioritize।

options_np: Segregation of duties, authorization, audits, reconciliation — organizational fraud prevent
explanation_np: Internal controls: duties segregate गर्ने, authorization levels, regular audits, reconciliation।

question_np: Whistleblower Nepal मा कसरी report गर्ने?
options_np: CIAA मा anonymous complaint — whistleblower protection provisions
explanation_np: Whistleblower: CIAA: ciaa.gov.np मा anonymous complaint। Protection provisions exist।

options_np: CIAA: 1113, Cyber Bureau: 1177 — anonymous options available
explanation_np: Anonymous reporting: CIAA (corruption), Cyber Bureau (cyber fraud) — anonymity possible।

question_np: Fraud hotline Nepal मा एउटै नम्बर छ?
options_np: No — different agencies: Police (100), Cyber (1177), DoFE (1180), NRB (1414)
explanation_np: Nepal मा single fraud hotline छैन। Different agencies: Police 100, Cyber Bureau 1177, DoFE 1180, NRB 1414।

options_np: International Fraud Awareness Week (November) — global, Nepal pनि participate
explanation_np: International Fraud Awareness Week: November। Global campaign — Nepal पनि awareness activities।

question_np: Fraud triangle theory भनेको के हो?
options_np: Pressure + Opportunity + Rationalization = fraud — classic fraud theory
explanation_np: Fraud Triangle: Pressure (motivation) + Opportunity (weak controls) + Rationalization (justification)।

question_np: Ponzi scheme को नाम कहाँबाट आयो?
options_np: Charles Ponzi — 1920s USA मा famous investment fraud
explanation_np: Charles Ponzi (1882-1949) — 1920s USA मा early investment scam। नाम उनैबाट।

options_np: Largest Ponzi scheme in history — $65 billion, USA 2008
explanation_np: Bernie Madoff: history को largest Ponzi scheme — $65 billion, USA, 2008 collapse।

options_np: Advance fee fraud — 'help me transfer money, get reward' classic scam
explanation_np: 419 scam (Nigerian criminal code section): advance fee fraud — 'transfer money, get commission'।

question_np: Pigeon drop scam भनेको के हो?
options_np: 'Found money, share it, pay advance' — classic street fraud
explanation_np: Pigeon drop: 'found large sum, will share if you pay upfront' — classic confidence trick।

options_np: Street fraud — impossible to win card guessing game
explanation_np: Three card monte: rigged street card game — impossible to win. Mela fraud को classic form।

options_np: Cup and ball — rigged street game, impossible to win
explanation_np: Shell game: cup/ball switched faster than eye can follow — rigged, impossible to win।

options_np: Advertise cheap product, switch to expensive — deceptive selling
explanation_np: Bait and switch: cheap product advertise, then say out of stock, push expensive — illegal।

options_np: Small unnoticeable amounts steal over time — computer/accounting fraud
explanation_np: Salami slicing: tiny unnoticed amounts (e.g., rounding fractions) steal from many — accumulate।

options_np: 'Pay now, get more later' — lottery, inheritance, prize — never comes
explanation_np: Advance fee fraud: 'small fee pay गर्नुस्, large reward receive गर्नुस्' — reward never comes।

options_np: Fake employees on payroll — salary for non-existent workers
explanation_np: Ghost employee: non-existent employees payroll मा — salary fraud। Internal audit detect।

options_np: ~50% — urban higher, rural lower — significant gap
explanation_np: Nepal digital literacy: ~50% (urban higher). Rural/elderly gap significant — fraud vulnerability।
Nepal internet: ~70%+ mobile internet penetration, growing rapidly। Digital fraud risk increasing।
Nepal smartphone: ~65%+ ownership, mostly budget Android। Mobile fraud risk high।
Nepal Facebook users: 12+ million. Largest social platform — major fraud vector।

options_np: Fake giveaways, investment scams, fake celebrities — growing threat
explanation_np: TikTok fraud: fake celebrity giveaways, investment scams, misinformation — report to platform।

options_np: Fake investment channels, impersonation, false info — report to YouTube
explanation_np: YouTube scam: fake investment gurus, celebrity impersonation। Report to YouTube + Cyber Bureau।

options_np: Fake products, shopping fraud, giveaway scams — report + Cyber Bureau
explanation_np: Instagram fraud: fake products, fraudulent giveaways, fake influencers। Report + Cyber Bureau: 1177।

options_np: Investment groups, fake news, crypto scams — major fraud platform Nepal
explanation_np: Telegram fraud: biggest crypto/investment fraud platform Nepal। Cyber Bureau: 1177 report।

options_np: Fake links, UPI/QR fraud, family emergency scams — common platform fraud
explanation_np: WhatsApp fraud: fake links, payment fraud, impersonation. Cyber Bureau: 1177।

options_np: Fake business accounts, OTP theft, link fraud — popular Nepal platform
explanation_np: Viber fraud: fake businesses, OTP theft, malicious links — Nepal को popular messaging app।

options_np: Limited — Beema Samiti registered companies, growing sector
explanation_np: Cyber insurance Nepal: limited but growing। Beema Samiti registered companies बाट।

question_np: Business continuity planning fraud context मा?
options_np: Fraud incident response plan — minimize damage, recovery steps
explanation_np: Business continuity: fraud incident response plan — containment, recovery, prevention improvement।

options_np: Identify, assess, control, monitor — ongoing process
explanation_np: Fraud risk: Identify risks → Assess impact/likelihood → Control measures → Monitor effectiveness।

options_np: Identity verify, references check, online search, official registration — basic steps
explanation_np: Due diligence: identity verify, reference check, Google search, official registration verify।

options_np: Urgency, unusual method (crypto/gift cards), pressure, large amount — red flags
explanation_np: Payment red flags: urgency, cryptocurrency/gift cards requested, extreme pressure, unusual large amounts।

options_np: Never legitimate for government/bank — always scam indicator
explanation_np: Gift card payment for 'taxes', 'fines', 'prizes' = ALWAYS scam। No legitimate entity requests this।

options_np: Difficult — international transfers hard to reverse। Swift action critical
explanation_np: Wire transfer recovery: very difficult especially international। Immediate bank notification critical।

options_np: Extremely difficult — blockchain transactions irreversible। Prevention critical
explanation_np: Crypto recovery: almost impossible — irreversible transactions। Prevention only defense।

options_np: Very difficult — no digital trail। Always prefer traceable payments
explanation_np: Cash recovery: very difficult (no trail). Bank transfer/digital payments = traceable = better recovery।

options_np: Bank transfer, digital wallets, cheque — all leave trails
explanation_np: Traceable: bank transfer, eSewa/Khalti, cheque — audit trail। Fraud recovery easier।

options_np: Limited — fidelity bonds, commercial crime insurance growing
explanation_np: Fraud/crime insurance Nepal: fidelity bonds, commercial crime coverage। Beema Samiti registered।

options_np: Employee dishonesty/fraud coverage — business protection insurance
explanation_np: Fidelity bond: employee fraud/theft coverage। Business employer protection insurance।

options_np: Professional errors, negligence coverage — lawyers, doctors, consultants
explanation_np: Professional liability (E&O insurance): professional mistakes, negligence — malpractice coverage।

options_np: Company leadership personal liability protection — governance fraud
explanation_np: D&O insurance: directors/officers personal liability coverage — governance failures, management fraud।

options_np: Third party guarantee — contractor, government contract performance
explanation_np: Surety bond: third party (surety) guarantee principal's obligation — contractor performance।

options_np: Contractor ले project complete गर्छ guarantee — fraud/default protection
explanation_np: Performance bond: contractor default भए bonding company compensate। Nepal construction common।

options_np: CIAA Act compliance, internal policies, training — organizational protection
explanation_np: Anti-bribery: CIAA compliance, internal anti-corruption policy, regular training।

options_np: NRB penalties, license risk, fraud facilitation — compliance critical
explanation_np: KYC failure: NRB penalties, license suspension risk, potential fraud facilitation liability।

options_np: Asset Laundering Prevention Act — mandatory for financial institutions
explanation_np: AML compliance: mandatory for all financial institutions। FIU Nepal oversight।

options_np: Regulatory compliance ensure गर्ने, fraud risk manage — critical position
explanation_np: Compliance officer: regulatory requirements ensure, fraud risk policies implement।

options_np: Financial fraud investigate गर्न accounting techniques — legal proceedings support
explanation_np: Forensic accounting: financial fraud investigate — evidence collect, legal testimony।

options_np: Electronic evidence collect, analyze — cybercrime, financial fraud investigation
explanation_np: Digital forensics: electronic devices, networks, cloud — evidence collect for fraud cases।

options_np: Evidence handling documentation — court admissibility ensure
explanation_np: Chain of custody: evidence collection, transfer, storage — documented to ensure court admissibility।

options_np: Technical/specialized knowledge provide — forensic accountant, IT expert
explanation_np: Expert witness: specialized knowledge (accounting, IT, medical) — court fraud case testimony।

options_np: Criminal Procedure Code provisions — reduced charges/sentence
explanation_np: Plea deal: Nepal Criminal Procedure Code प्रावधान। Prosecution discretion।

options_np: Criminal Code — fraud proceeds confiscate गर्न सकिन्छ
explanation_np: Asset forfeiture: Nepal Criminal Code — crime proceeds, property confiscate।

options_np: Criminal court — victim लाई compensation order
explanation_np: Restitution: criminal court ले convicted person लाई victim compensation order।
Civil damages: actual loss + exemplary damages। District Court civil jurisdiction।

options_np: Court order — debtor को wages/bank account बाट payment force
explanation_np: Garnishment: court ले debtor को employer/bank लाई directly payment order।

options_np: District Court — assets freeze, business stop order
explanation_np: Injunction: District Court — asset freeze, business operations stop — fraud prevent।

options_np: District Legal Aid Committee + Bar Association + NGOs — free legal help
explanation_np: Legal aid: District Legal Aid Committee (government), Bar Association, NGOs — free/subsidized।

options_np: Some lawyers/law firms — free legal services for vulnerable people
explanation_np: Pro bono: some lawyers provide free services. Bar Association encourages pro bono work।

options_np: Supreme Court मा file — public interest issues, rights violations
explanation_np: PIL: Nepal Supreme Court मा file गर्न सकिन्छ — public interest issues।

options_np: Multiple victims collective case — legal provisions exist
explanation_np: Class action: multiple fraud victims collective case। Nepal civil procedure allow।

options_np: Limited provisions — criminal procedure, some court awards
explanation_np: Victim compensation: court restitution orders, some government provisions। Limited system।

options_np: Alternative approach — victim-offender mediation, community healing
explanation_np: Restorative justice: victim-offender dialogue, community-based resolution. Nepal — limited practice।
Diversion: first-time minor offenders — counseling, community service alternative to prosecution।
Probation: Nepal Criminal Code provisions — supervised release with conditions।

options_np: Early release from prison — conditions compliance
explanation_np: Parole: Nepal provisions exist — early release with conditions for good behavior।

options_np: Limited provisions — minor offenses, youth offenders
explanation_np: Record expungement: Nepal limited provisions। Minor offenses, youth offenders — case by case।

options_np: Year-round awareness — digital, financial literacy, community programs
explanation_np: Year-round fraud prevention: NRB, Police, NGOs — ongoing awareness programs।

options_np: Curriculum integration needed — financial literacy, digital safety, critical thinking
explanation_np: School programs: financial literacy, digital safety, critical thinking — fraud prevention foundation।

options_np: Youth-to-youth education — trusted, relatable, effective channel
explanation_np: Peer education: youth-to-youth fraud awareness — trust, cultural relevance, effectiveness।

options_np: Rural reach — effective fraud awareness channel Nepal
explanation_np: Radio/FM: major rural outreach tool Nepal। Fraud awareness programs effective for non-internet users।
Mobile van: bring fraud awareness directly to remote communities — demonstrations, Q&A।

options_np: Helpline: immediate, personal. Online: evidence attachments, documentation, 24/7
explanation_np: Helpline: immediate guidance, elderly/non-digital users। Online: evidence upload, documentation।

options_np: Government + Private sector + Civil society + Media + International — collective approach
explanation_np: Effective fraud prevention: government, private sector, civil society, media, international collaboration।

options_np: Banks + Police + Telecoms + Tech companies — data sharing, awareness
explanation_np: PPP: banks, police, telecoms, tech — data sharing, coordinated response, public awareness।

options_np: Interpol, bilateral agreements, mutual legal assistance — cross-border fraud
explanation_np: International cooperation: Interpol, MLATs (Mutual Legal Assistance Treaties) — transnational fraud।

options_np: Bilateral treaties — criminals in other countries request
explanation_np: Extradition: bilateral treaties। Nepal मा limited extradition treaties। Improving।

options_np: Most countries: registration, KYC, AML requirements — Nepal पनि evolving
explanation_np: Global crypto: KYC/AML requirements, exchange registration। Nepal: NRB framework developing।

options_np: NRB exploring digital Rupee — fraud resistance, financial inclusion
explanation_np: CBDC: NRB exploring digital Rupee। Financial inclusion, fraud resistance potential।

options_np: Multiple tools — fraud scoring, anomaly detection, rule-based systems
explanation_np: Open source fraud detection: fraud scoring models, anomaly detection, network analysis tools।

options_np: Banks/fintechs use ML — real-time transaction fraud scoring
explanation_np: ML fraud detection: real-time transaction scoring, anomaly detection, pattern recognition — banks use।

options_np: User behavior patterns analyze — unusual activity flag
explanation_np: Behavioral analytics: typing patterns, mouse movement, login time — unusual behavior = fraud alert।

options_np: Transaction networks map — fraud rings, money laundering identify
explanation_np: Network analysis: transaction relationships map — fraud rings, circular transactions identify।

options_np: Banks: real-time transaction analysis — immediate flag, block
explanation_np: Real-time monitoring: transaction scoring instant — suspicious = immediate hold, SMS alert।

options_np: Real + fake info combine गरेर fake identity — credit fraud
explanation_np: Synthetic identity: real SSN/ID + fake info combine — credit applications, financial fraud।

options_np: Multiple account data centralize — single breach = all exposed
explanation_np: Account aggregation: convenience vs risk — single breach expose multiple accounts। Strong security needed।

options_np: Unauthorized API access — data scraping, transaction fraud, rate abuse
explanation_np: API abuse: unauthorized access, data theft, transaction manipulation। Rate limiting, authentication crucial।

options_np: NRB: fonePay QR standard — interoperability, security baseline
explanation_np: Nepal QR payment: NRB/fonePay standardized QR — merchant verification, security standards।

options_np: RFID-blocking wallet, transaction limits, monitoring — prevent skimming
explanation_np: Contactless fraud prevent: RFID wallet, low transaction limits, regular statement check।

options_np: Customer ले legit purchase dispute गरेर refund claim गर्ने — friendly fraud
explanation_np: Chargeback fraud (friendly fraud): legitimate purchase भए पनि dispute file — merchant loses।

options_np: Fake merchants, overcharging, counterfeit products — NRB, Consumer Forum
explanation_np: Merchant fraud: fake merchant accounts, overcharging. NRB (digital) + Consumer Forum report।

options_np: Card skimming, fake terminal, double charging — receipt check, card shield
explanation_np: POS fraud: skimming devices, double charging। Always shield card, check receipt।

options_np: Fake points, unauthorized redemption — airline, retail programs
explanation_np: Loyalty fraud: fake points earning, unauthorized redemption. Monitor account activity।

options_np: Unauthorized subscriptions, impossible cancellation — payment statement monitor
explanation_np: Subscription fraud: unauthorized charges, difficult cancellation। Monitor statements regularly।

options_np: Fake return claims, used items return — retailer policies, documentation
explanation_np: Refund fraud: fake return claims, used item returns. Retailers: receipt requirement, inspection।

options_np: Disaster/shortage मा excessive pricing — Consumer Protection Act, DoC report
explanation_np: Price gouging: disaster/shortage मा excessive prices। Consumer Protection Act। DoC report।

options_np: DDA + Police — serious crime, public health risk
explanation_np: Counterfeit medicine: DDA: 1800-01-8899 + Police। Public health serious crime।
